diagrams.title: Design Thinking Double Diamond with Ideation
diagrams.description: Shows how Ideation fits between Problem Definition and Solution Creation phases
elements: Emphasis on Ideation as the creative bridge
diagrams.purpose: Understand positioning of ideation in the overall design thinking process

diagrams.title: SCAMPER Matrix
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the seven SCAMPER prompts for idea transformation
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for applying SCAMPER technique during ideation

diagrams.title: Divergent vs Convergent Thinking
diagrams.description: Visual showing the two-phase nature of ideation - expanding then narrowing ideas
elements: Wide funnel for divergent thinking (many ideas)
Narrow funnel for convergent thinking (selected ideas)
Diamond shape showing the oscillation between both
diagrams.purpose: Clarify that ideation includes both generating and selecting ideas
